nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion list for the cleanup-stale cron service, preventing unnecessary files from being sent to the Docker daemon.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Minimal Alpine-based Docker image for the cleanup-stale cron job, which invokes cron-runner.sh on a schedule to trigger the corresponding Supabase edge function that removes stale records.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses alpine:3.23 with only curl and ca-certificates added; the entrypoint delegates to a shared cron-runner.sh script parameterized by a CLEANUP_ environment variable.
